name: Modal
purpose: Focused overlay for confirmations, entity detail edits, and destructive action gating.

structures.name: Confirm Dialog
structures.notes: Centered panel with title, supporting copy, and a primary/quiet action pair.

structures.name: Destructive Dialog
structures.notes: Leading destructive icon; confirm button uses the destructive token.

structures.name: Form Modal
structures.notes: Header with close control; body scrolls while footer stays pinned.

interactionNotes: Overlay scrim uses a translucent foreground wash, not pure black.
Panel relies on a border plus large shadow token; corners use the shared radius scale.
